assertions.note: No 'Welcome to DataPipe!' — starts with '# DataPipe' then immediate one-line description.
Replaced vague 'Easy to use, Highly configurable' list with a concrete 'When to Use DataPipe' section with real use cases and honest alternatives.
Full Pipeline example with source, transform, output, and run() — concrete and runnable.
Explicit Limitations section: single-machine, <1GB data, limited connectors. Also honest about alternatives (Airflow, dbt, Spark).
